title: Research Security Training — Approved Options (Required)
content: REQUIRED for all MSU personnel engaged in federally funded research. Complete one of three approved Research Security Training options and retain the certificate of completion for audit purposes. Options: (1) CITI Program at https://citiprogram.org/ — requires MSU account establishment; (2) NSF SECURE Center at https://www.secure-center.org/ctm; (3) NSF Research Security Training Modules at https://www.nsf.gov/research-security/training. Contact ORA at ask.ora@morgan.edu with questions.
